reviews.title: A+
reviews.text: Works great!!!!!

reviews.title: Really neat little smartwatch.
reviews.text: If you’re looking for a smartwatch that won’t break the bank but still provide handy applications at your literal fingertips, then this is a great buy! Works with iPhone or Android and it’s super easy to set up. The battery life so far is pretty good but I also haven’t had it for too long so will update if anything goes haywire. So far it’s exactly as described by the seller and it arrived quickly and packaged nicely. Great for self-use or a gift.

reviews.title: Not a Good Choice for Me
reviews.text:
Like - was able to call and receive texts. Was able to answer a call on the watch. Pairing was easy. The app was easy.
Dislike - Once paired, the watch takes all your media volume away from your phone. You won't hear any music like from YouTube, text message alert or phone ringing. The watch has a little vibration that you can barely feel, when you receive a text or getting a phone call. All sounds like from Facebook videos or anything, goes through the watch. The only way I could find to get it to quit doing this, was to unpair the watch totally. I need military time but couldn't find a way to make the time in a 24 hour format. You have to put the watch together. The bands come apart from the watch. Everytime you move your hand the watch face lights up. This was definitely not what I was looking for at all. Would I buy this again? No.

reviews.title: Keep track
reviews.text: This fitness tracker is simple to setup and in no time it'll be keeping track of your health so you have a monitor of what you do every day. It's simple to track and manage your sleep patterns or steps you take in a day. Very simple to use mobile app. The watch lasts a long time before dieing at least 2 days

reviews.title: Super impressed with this watch. Truly remarkable
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:ae47b9651b52b2c1b0485219f33680bf]] Wow. I am not impressed by much, but this watch is truly impressive for this price point.

Build: Very good build quality. The waterproof case feels solid, with responsive buttons and full color high res screen. Bracelet is soft rubber and is very comfortable. It's a very large band, so large or small wrists will fit in here.

Features: Though not perfect, the features on this watch are impressive. Measures steps, activities, heart rate, laps, sleep quality. Very very nice featuers. Plus it's waterproof!!!

Cons: Some of the interfaces are a bit clunky, and the app could use work, but it's fairly intuitive, and easy to use. I connected to my Galaxy S7 with no problems.

I recommend this watch!

reviews.title: My favorite budget smart watch
reviews.text:
I've tried a variety of budget smart watches, and this one by Dr.Viva has become my favorite. It's very comfortable, great flexible band, no issues with feeling like it's pressing into my wrist bones. The screen display is a good size without being too large, perfect for smaller wrists.

The Zeroner app has been fantastic, no problems. It accurately tracks my steps, sleep & oxygen. I like how it has a variety of exercises for me to document. The battery life is a big winner. I recharge the smart watch once a week, compared to twice a week with the other watches I've tried before. I was disappointed that I don't have the option to have my own picture as the screen display, but the app still has plenty of screens to choose from.

If you're like me and don't want to spend an exorbitant price on a smart watch, but would still like to enjoy the features of a smart watch this one would be a great option.

reviews.title: Inaccurate
reviews.text: This is a cute watch. Set up was simple. I liked the pink band and it was comfortable. The multi-lingual instructions are useless. Even worse it is inaccurate. I was at my desk and took it off. When I came back it said I logged 1800 steps.  It was sitting in the same place on the desk. Not. Back to my fit bit.

reviews.title: Very Durable and Love the Face
reviews.text:
The watch and band are more durable than I expected at this price point. The watch is very easy to install and should not take more than 5 minutes. For some reason I really like the aesthetics on the face of the watch.

I have another watch that is comparable and this watch costs 25% less. This is definitely good value. A watch like this is a game changer for people monitoring heart issues. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Good watch. Has sensory issues
reviews.text: Husband loves his Christmas gift. Only complaint we have is he has flick his wrist multiple times very hard to get it to light up. He plans to see if there’s  anything he can on his end to not have to that. It’s a great watch for the price.

reviews.title: Great watch
reviews.text: This watch did everything I needed it to do.  It keeps very accurate time and has many excellent features.  The ones I was most interested in were the sleep tracker, heart and blood pressure monitor and step counter as these  are medically necessary.  The accuracy was top of the line.  My only issue is this watch caused the area on my skin that contacted the watch to get a bad rash.  While the rash was essentially harmless, it is caused by a chemical reaction in my body.  Not the watches fault, and I've experienced this side effect with other watches in the past.  Now I use it only occasionally and for only a couple of days at a time to still track the previously mentioned condition.  It's a great watch that I would recommend.

reviews.text: Chose this watch because of the simplicity and overall look.  The step counts and sleep features work very well.  Battery life is approximately 2 days use when using the push button feature.  If you enable the sensor to come on with your wrist approximately 1 day use.  Charge works very well and quickly.  The downfall is definitely the rubber banding.  The piece that holds the excess band tends to move.  Call feature is ok for the price and messaging is ok.  I primarily needed for an alarm, clock and date.

reviews.title: great smartwatch
reviews.text: I bought this for my uncle for his birthday. He wanted a smart watch to monitor his health. He liked it and it was easy for him to set up.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: I had an Apple Watch before this. This is really no different than the Apple Watch,  everything that worked on there works fine here! Did find a screen protector  it is (Smaat 1.7”) it fits perfect! And touch screen still works fine. as far as I can tell there are no other bands made for this type of connection, which is kind of ridiculous. So if the band breaks, you literally have to buy a new watch don’t like that! Also, wish it could at least have the temperature on the screen! And there are only certain screens that have the power level or day and date, and you cannot pick a screen from your photos, etc. and add the date. Just trying to inform people of all of the things that I was looking for in reviews and no one ever mentioned any of these hopefully it helps!

reviews.title: Nice watch!
reviews.text: I bought this watch to track my fitness mainly.  I'm not the type of person who's into gadgets per se but I think this is a winner.  It's not expensive but still stylish and functional.

title: Michael Kors Access Gen 4 MKGO Smartwatch- Lightweight Touchscreen Powered with Wear OS by Google with Heart Rate, GPS, NFC, and Smartphone Notifications
features: Smartwatches powered with Wear OS by Google work with iPhone and Android Phones

Heart Rate & Activity Tracking using Google Fit; Built in GPS for distance tracking; Swimproof design 3ATM; Google Assistant built in it’s your own personal Google, always ready to help; Speed through checkout with your watch using Google Pay

This is one smart watch receive smartphone notifications and app alerts, manage your calendar, control your music, download third party apps (your favorite ride sharing or music apps), and customize your watch face; touchscreen functionality, built in fitness tracker, microphone, music storage & controls, custom goal & alarm settings, calendar alerts, multiple time zones, weather, LED flashlight, wireless syncing
Estimated 24 hour battery life, based on usage plus 2 additional days in low power mode; magnetic USB rapid charger included; charge up to 80 percent in under an hour
AMOLED display: active-matrix organic light-emitting diode. Water resistant up to 50m: Wearable while swimming in shallow water

reviews.title: It could have been so much better.
reviews.text: I have so many feelings about this watch. First off, set up was a breeze. You just open your app store and get the Google app directed. Pairing and synching up your info is very easy. The watch is very beautiful! I was scared the crystals would rub right off like glitter, but I have not had any issues so far. Now for all the bad stuff.. first and foremost the battery life is terrible. I would give it 9-10 hours max. I'm not much of an app person either, so if you are then that means your battery life will be even lower. It has its own charger, so that means you'll have to carry it around with you, especially big your planning to go out after work or school which is very inconvenient. I with it was a standard C USB charger so I can just use my phone charger, but sadly that's not the case. I did an experiment to see how long the battery would last. I charged it to 100%, and left it in my desk right before bed. In the morning at 8 am, I am at 15%. Whoa. Yeah, the battery is just really really terrible. So I thought I'd just change the battery settings..well there is only one other option and that is to go into battery saving mode where all it will display is the time. That in my opinion defeats the purpose of a smart watch. Other than that, I love how I can customize watch faces by using my social media, or pick from a pre made list by Michael Kors. You can also get email notifications, download apps like Google keep to take notes by speaking into your watch, as well as use Google pay, activity tracker, weather, and pause and play music without taking out your phone. So yeah, if your okay with a short battery life, then everything else about this watch is awesome. Just giving you the real tea. Hope you found this review helpful.

reviews.title: Great feminine watch for dress up or down
reviews.text: This watch works with android and iPhone which makes this a winner in my book. It does pretty much everything my iwatch series 4 does and it looks beautiful on my wrist. Charger is magnetic and easy to use.

reviews.title: Easy set up - does what a smartphone can do
reviews.text:
My wife really likes this watch. This is the one with the glittery watchband... It comes with a magnetic charger that just attaches to the back - no fidgeting. And I was surprised at how quickly it charged.

The screen colors are great! Vibrant colors and clear graphics. The touchscreen itself can lag just a little, but overall responds very well. Neither one of us have ever had a smartwatch before and I was a little apprehensive about setting it up, but I downloaded the wear OS app to her phone and from there, it just walked us through the process. It paired on the first try and seems to be working just as it should.

She's now got it set up to check emails and can generally do anything on the internet that she would do with her phone. Then theres the added advantage of the fitness stuff... heart rate monitor, etc.

All in all, she loves it!

reviews.title: Still Searching
reviews.text:
The MKGO has the best battery life of any WearOS watches I've tried. On a fairly busy day with the app running in the background on my iPhone the whole time, I was able to wear the watch from 6 a.m. until I went to bed around 10. The other three android watches I've tried didn't make it to dinner.

But this doesn't have a speaker.

Why doesn't this have a speaker?

One of the indispensable features of my Apple watch is being able to answer a call quickly when I have stepped out of the room my phone is in. I have lupus. I can't run. People somehow seem to know to call about something important when I've gone to the bathroom or stepped out to the mailbox. I'm close enough to be connected to my phone, but not close enough to answer it.

This never happens with spam calls. Just the ones from the people I won't be able to get back to through their nightmare phone menus.

The lack of this feature makes the watch unsuitable for me, and that makes me sad, because the iPhone is a begware spamming disappointment machine these days, and I really want to move to android.

reviews.title: Nice watch
reviews.text: Shipping was very slow but the watch is nice.  Took minutes to install.  easier than my apple watch.  does everything i need that my series 4 does but is discrete and fashionable.  Love the pink color..... my favorite.  Touchscreen works fine and easy to navigate.  A great buy for those who dont necessarily want an apple watch.  I am able to sync my contacts and apps to the watch.  Tracks my heart-rate on command.  I love this watch.

reviews.title: DO NOT BUY worked less than 60 days and no customer support.
reviews.text:
DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY. YOU WILL REGRET IT!!!!
UPDATE: Less than 60 days and the watched completely stopped working.
Being new to using a smart watch I didn't want to invest a fortune. Read lots of reviews and decided to give this one a try. It is perfect. It does everything I want it to do. It looks great. It is simple to set it up as you want. AND they provided exceptional customer service!

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text: This watch has never worked and the instructions did not help.

reviews.title: There are TWO ways of rating this... Garbage or almost garbage.
reviews.text:
There are two ways of rating purchases... either an overall evaluation IRREGARDLESS of the price OR... CONSIDERING THE PRICE. Considering I paid $20 for it... not horrible. BUT here are the SERIOUS flaws so far:

-The Blood Pressure monitor is a COMPLETE JOKE. "Inaccurate" is NOT the word. I tried it on several friends and coworkers. Garbage!
-You are supposed to be able to make a gesture of bringing your wrist up to view the watch and then it is supposed to turn the screen on so that you can read it. ALMOST NEVER! No matter HOW I make the gesture the only thing that works is a PAINFUL twist/shake of my wrist and then it's not guaranteed. I just use the button instead which kind of defeats the purpose.
-BUT THEN, when sleeping.... EVERY DAMNED MOVEMENT I MAKE it turns on... and waking up my wife, because it is like having a flashlight shone in your face!!!!!!!!!!!

So... EVEN THOUGH this was only $20... SAVE YOUR MONEY FOR SOMETHING THAT ACTUALLY WORKS AND WORKS WELL.

reviews.title: Great Smart Watch!
reviews.text: It is a great dupe of Apple Watch.  I absolutely love it. The greatest attraction is the extended battery time (7 to 10 days). I also like various fitness track features such as step count, heart-beat, workout routine. I could check weather too. Another interesting feature is the multiple watch face options. However I struggled a bit figuring out how to change those watch faces. The watch faces can be changed easily using the APP. I found the questions and answers mentioned on the webpage pretty helpful when figuring out other elements.

reviews.title: Bad watch!
reviews.text: The mobile app works fine! But after five months the watch failed to take a charge!! Try a new charger and the watch still wouldn't take a charge! Now I have a Dead watch! A watch should last longer than five months!!!!!

reviews.title: Like it was made by Fitbit!
reviews.text:
I love this strap it is so pretty and such a value for the money. It looks like it cost way more. The little kit it came with to attach it to the Fitbit and to remove extra links was so handy and easy to use. It attached with no trouble at all.

The only issue I had with it was that the rose gold color is slightly off from the Fitbit, but when wearing it, it’s not next to it directly so you can’t really tell. It’s not enough to bother me or take a star off but it could be for some.

reviews.title: Surprised at the comfort and beauty of the band.
reviews.text:
I've only had it on for a few hours, but I love it. The colors, black, pink on the resin look so rich and shiny. And it's a comfortable fit. I did have to take out 2 tabs to get a snug fit. Taking out the tabs wasn't difficult after figuring out the way the tool that came with it. Can't say the instructions were the best, but I figured it out.
I always got the magnetic mesh band in rose gold, but it always discolored and no matter what i tried I couldn't get it cleaned.
This is why I tried a new band. A review prompt gave suggestions of different things to comment on. One of the suggestions was a mobile app. I have no idea what that had to do with the band. Maybe someone knows and can let me know.
UPDATE:
I've been wearing it 24 hours a day, except when showering or recharging the watch. NO discloration, no running of colors (bracelet) and it doesn't get dirty looking like the metalic bands. I'm going to buy another one, just in case something happens to this. So worth the money.

reviews.title: My daughter is obsessed with the watch
reviews.text: This is a perfect alternative of a smart watch. I didn't want to get a real smart watch for my daughter because they are so expensive but she kept insisting on it. Saw this kids watch the other day and bought. She thinks it's an apple watch Haha. She loved it and I'm so happy.

reviews.title: She Loves It!
reviews.text: Picture and video is clear and the games and other things on it are fun. This will also help children to learn time and definitely a good beginners watch for a kid. She figured out how to use many of the features without my help. Lots of great features. She likes to set her alarm clock every morning. This is a great first watch and a perfect gift.

reviews.title: It was ok.
reviews.text:
It's very cute. But let's talk about it.
The Camara was a bit blurry.
Never tried the music option so I don't know.
The pedometer would mark a step even when just moving hands so that wasn't accurate.
We had some trouble setting the alarm clock and set chores.
And the games were cute and fun but killed the battery fast.
I guess I was hopping too much out of this.
It was a gift for my daughter since her timex watch went out. But unfortunately it doesn't have a connect to phone feature where she could receive messages when I'm out and about running errands or late to pick her up from school for that matter. The battery didn't last long and even though my girl liked it, it wasn't too functional for what we needed it for. As I was going to return it my dog had other plans. So yeah the watch didn't survived it's attacker. So it's not dog proofed. Lol 😂

title: HOK Smart Watch Bluetooth Call & Text Receive/Dial Smartwatch for Android & iOS Phone with 1.69" Touch Screen Fitness Activity Tracker Women Men

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: This watch has a lot of features. I am honestly still finding new ones after a few weeks. Hard to believe all of features at this price point. Had a conversation with someone who couldn't tell it was thru the watch instead of the phone... Very clear. I do wish it came with a manual or website too show you all the features but great watch.

reviews.title: Fit nice,but that's it.
reviews.text: The battery sucks big time. I'm returning because of battery life,if it was better I'd keep it.

reviews.title: This watch has everything I wanted on it.
reviews.text: I love this watch it does so much and wasn't high priced.

reviews.title: Love
reviews.text: Does what it's supposed to do

reviews.title: Works fine for the price.
reviews.text: Works fine. Gets all the important medical info needed.

title: OCTANDRA Active VeryFitPro Fitness Tracker HR Heart Rate Sleep Monitor Step Counter IP67 Waterproof Activity Tracker Smart Band Pedometer Running Smart Watch for Men & Women (ID115Plus HR) (Black)
features: [Turn Your Good Intentions into Lifelong Habits] Get motivated and step up your daily activity goals with Octandra Active Fitness Watch for Men and Women! Apart from its main task of monitoring your health and fitness, it works as your personal digital assistant!

[Stay Active with Very Fit Pro] Download VeryFitPro from Google Play or App Store, pair the sports watch and start using its advanced health monitoring tools - Compatible with both Android 4.4, iOS 8.0 or above!

[All Day Fitness Tracker Watch] - Works as a heart rate monitor, step tracker and calorie counter. Also it monitors distance, pace and active minutes to give you a clear picture of your health and fitness!

[Advanced Sleep Tracker] Octandra Health Watch monitors the quantity and quality of your sleep and give clearer picture of how much quality sleep you’re getting! (Monitors deep sleep, light sleep, and awake time)
[Multi Sports Modes] With 14 sports modes, Octandra Smart Watches for Men and Women help you better understand each sport. (You can select 3 activity modes at a time via the app)

[Thoughtfully Crafted Design] Octandra Smart Bracelet features 0.96-inch Black and White OLED screen, IP67 waterproof design (Not suitable to wear while swimming or bathing. Can be worn while jogging in the rain or doing the dishes) and soft TPE straps which suit wrist sizes from 5.4 to 7.6 inches!

[Convenient USB Charging with Long-Lasting Battery] Enjoy 5-7 days of battery life with 1-2 hours charging time via built-in USB! (During actual use, battery life is related to various factors such as settings, operations, and operating conditions, and therefore may differ from the test conditions)
[A Sweet Life Companion] Never miss your calls, texts, and social app notifications with Octandra Active Exercise Watch!
[More Practical Tools] You can use our running watch as a stop watch, sedentary reminder, alarm watch, and camera shutter remote control of your smartphone!

[Important] This fitness band is not a medical device. All the measurement data and results are provided for reference only and cannot be compared with the results of professional medical devices, used to perform professional diagnosis or monitoring of any medical conditions. Due to external factors (such as arm hair, tattoos, or darker skin), there may be cases where measurement results are inaccurate or even unavailable!

reviews.title: Not a good buy
reviews.text: The 1st one I got "went crazy" and started just cycling thru the various screens on the watch.  I returned it and got a replacement because we all know that "stuff happens".  I got the replacement and it seemed to be working well until day 28, when it stopped connecting with the app at all, even though I installed and uninstalled it several times as the troubleshooting recommended.  Then it started draining my battery dry and that meant it needed to be returned.  Don't waste your money on this one unless you have LOTS of time to fiddle with it!

reviews.title: I can’t set the watch up to show the correct day time and rate
reviews.text: I can’t get it to work properly.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text: Perfect for keeping steps.

reviews.title: Good.
reviews.text: Good.

reviews.title: I wanted to like this product...
reviews.text:
I wanted a simple activity tracker and this looked like it was perfect. There are a number of things that worked well, battery life, simplicity, matched my needs... However, the accuracy is non existent. I was at the gym working out vigorously and my heart rate was 50 and dropping. I checked it with another app on my phone and I was approaching 140. When I am at rest it creeps into the 90's. by the way, I have entered all profile info. The steps are also way off as I tested against an app on my phone.

I tried but its not worth the effort.

title: AGPTEK Smart Watch for Women, Smartwatch for Android and iOS Phones IP68 Waterproof Activity Tracker with Full Touch Color Screen Heart Rate Monitor Pedometer Sleep Monitor, Pink
features: 【Your Watch, Your Style】1.3"/33mm touch screen covered with rose gold metal frame, so elegant and nice, but sturdy and anti-scratch. The smart watch contains 5 dials readily available to choose from along with another 30 more dials within the app. You can also customize your watch faces. It can be any photo, such as your family, pet ,etc. NOTE: When there is a software update prompt on the APP, it is recommended to upgrade to the latest software version for a better experience!

【Your Personal Smart Assistant】Activity tracker (pedometer, calories, distance), heart rate, various sport modes, sleep monitoring.,etc. Get notifications of Call, SMS, and APP messages(THE WATCH CAN NOT MAKE MESSAGES, CALLS or TEXT BACK, Bluetooth distance 8-10 meters), remote control of music and cameras, weather report, sedentary reminder, alarm clock, stopwatch, find phone, call rejection, brightness adjustment, power-saving mode, and other functions to meet your daily needs.

【Long Battery & IP68 Waterproof】The smartwatch only takes 2 hours to charge and can be used for 7-10 days or 30 days standby time, much longer than most traditional watches. The fitness watch is IP68 waterproof, you can wear it when washing hands, in the rain(Note: Do Not use in water more than 100. 40℉, such as showers, saunas, spring, etc).

【Safe Guard Your Health】Advanced HR sensor for accurate and effective heart rate monitoring, helping you better understand your health and making a reasonable adjustment to your lifestyle. Automatic sleep tracking can monitor your sleep status (deep sleep, shallow sleep, awakening) and provide a comprehensive sleep quality analysis to help become healthier. You can view the summary of your status in the fitcloudpro APP.

【Overtake Your Expectations】The AGPTEK smart watch is compatible with most iOS 9.0 & Android 5.0 or higher smart phones version to notify you of call, text, email, calendar, and app notifications(NOTE: Bluetooth connection is 8-10m). The package includes:AGPTEK Smart Watch*1, Watch Strap*1, Magnetic Charger*1,User Manual*1. If your have any problem, please feel free to contact our customer service via your amazon account.

reviews.title: Very limited life span
reviews.text: Too costly for what is now a disposable watch.  Within about 3 months the watch started randomly sending two vibrating signals like it was trying to make a notification of some sort.  Second vibration came with a short screen request to shut down the watch.  Side button quit working after about a month but was not an issue.  Still kept accurate time, fairly good step counts, and notifications of incoming texts and phone calls.  Just can’t stand the frequent and random vibrating. Unlike other commenters my watches battery life was very good.

reviews.title: It stopped for no reason twice
reviews.text: I am returning the first one that I got because I think perhaps there may be a flaw in it because for no reason at all it just shut itself off or wouldn't show me any information on the watch and it did that to me twice so when it happened again today the second time I decided I'm returning it and requesting a replacement if it happens with the replacement then I'm getting my refund. I don't like sleeping with it on it's uncomfortable not used to sleeping with any kind of jewelry I did use it a few days and checked my sleep and it seemed to give me the same answer every time so I don't know if that's very accurate either? I realize these gadgets are not accurate however I'm just trying to find a way to motivate myself to move around more and I refuse to pay over $100 for one of these smart watches so I got this one on a lightning deal.

reviews.title: not as advertised
reviews.text:
the watch face does not come on when you raise your arm or turn or flick your wrist. this is a major problem if you assistive devices for walking.
the advertised picture is not available as a watchface when setting up the watch.
this watch is very heavy.
the band is inflexible plastic, not silicone-like at all.

this product is going back.

reviews.title: Not impressed--clock always switches to between modes--walking mode never stayed on not reliable
reviews.text: i made a mistake choosing this product switching between screens never tracked sleep,walking,sports and exercise time

reviews.title: Easy to sync, love this watch
reviews.text: I just received this watch today. So easy to set up. My Samsung S2 would not keep a charge despite everything I did. So I started searching for a new smart watch. I read many, many reviews on this watch. The price was phenomenal  so I thought I would try it! So far its just what I wanted. Easy, stylish. I bought the black one, but switched out bands to a turquoise one. So happy with it!

reviews.title: So comfortable!
reviews.text: Best band I’ve ever worn! These are so comfortable and lightweight that I sometimes forgot I have my Fitbit on! It’s breathable! I like that it was so many holes that you can use to tighten with. Sometimes with others their so far apart that it’s righter too loose or too tight. Trust me, you will not have that issue with this band! The design is so beautiful and the colors are perfect!

reviews.title: Great bands
reviews.text: Comfortable and lots of holes to change size. Looks pretty and I like the thinner band.

reviews.title: Easier to set-up than previous bands
reviews.text:
I have really struggled getting replacement bands in place in the past. I had this one switched over in a matter of minutes. The lacy look makes it less apparent that the band is vinyl and the dark colors help to hide stains. I have bad metal allergies nd was a bit afraid of what would happen with the clasp given it is metal and has some contact with my skin. Been wearing this since December and the only time I have issues with a rash was when I had the watch fastened too tightly to my wrist. I believe this was from trapped sweat and moisture and not a metal allergy reaction.
Extra great deal in that you get three bands. I don't foresee a need to buy more bands for at least a year.

reviews.title: Pretty
reviews.text: Cute style; nice colors; comfortable to wear.

reviews.title: Comfortable and affordable
reviews.text:
I really like the pink bandThe material is cool and comfortable. It is easy to change the bands for a different look.
I would definitely buy again.
